parameters.subject: ={{ 'ENBA Stories [' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.category + '] ' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.cycleProgress + ' ' + $('Set Slot').first().json.slot + ' publicada ✓' }}
parameters.text:
={{ 'Story publicada correctamente.

Categoría: ' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.category + '
Caption: ' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.caption + '
Archivo: ' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.file + '
IG Story ID: ' + $json.id + '
Ciclo: ' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.cycleProgress + '
Slot: ' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.slot + ' (' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.time + ' ART)
Timestamp: ' + $('Pick Next Story').first().json.timestamp }}
